title: SECL Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 43 Junior Technical Inspector Posts
description: The South Eastern Coalfields Limited (SECL) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 43 Junior Technical Inspector Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed any degree and a B.Sc can apply for the SECL Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we have mentioned the education details, age limit, selection process, appl...
